instructions.instruction: Use this skill when the task is to design or review how a host app installs and configures a Rails engine — generating initializers, copying migrations, mounting routes, or exposing a single install command.
instructions.original_snippets: Use this skill when the task is to design or review how a host app installs and configures a Rails engine — generating initializers, copying migrations, mounting routes, or exposing a single install command.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger create-engine-installer.

instructions.instruction: **Core principle:** Setup must be explicit, repeatable, and safe to rerun. Never modify the host app at boot time.
instructions.original_snippets: **Core principle:** Setup must be explicit, repeatable, and safe to rerun. Never modify the host app at boot time.
instructions.relevant_when: When a user asks for Rails work that should trigger create-engine-installer.
